findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 44. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Digital signature metadata rendered as visible text in the memo header, disrupting reading order
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows 'From: Elizabeth S. Werner' followed immediately by 'Division of Waste Management / Raleigh Central Office'. The HTML inserts four lines of digital signature metadata between them: 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner', 'DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Solid Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US', and 'Date: 2016.04.28 09:56:21 -04'00''. This content is not visually present on the PDF page and breaks the memo header flow.

findings.description: The HTML wraps the email address from the digital signature metadata block in a mailto: hyperlink that does not exist in the source PDF. The PDF presents 'email=elizabeth.werner@nc denr.gov' as plain text within the digital signature annotation.
findings.evidence: HTML: elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov. PDF: plain text in digital signature block: 'email=elizabeth.werner@nc denr.gov, c=US' with no hyperlink.
